message:
feat(tui): allow search from Detail focus in Graph and Insights modes

Pressing / while in Detail focus now auto-switches to List focus and
activates search, rather than being silently ignored. This matches
user expectations since search operates on the list pane.

Also updates 12 snapshots for the Board and Insights footer changes
(Tab focus, / search, link hints).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
